title: Harsh251005/Evident-AI
summary: Evident AI 是一个以可靠性为中心的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，通过PDF文件提供有证据支持的回答，内置评估和生产级可观察性。该系统使用Python语言构建，集成了模型训练、推理、向量索引和缓存机制，适用于需要高精度问答和证据支持的场景。
description: Evident AI is a reliability-focused Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that answers questions over PDFs with evidence-backed responses, built-in evaluation, and production-grade observability.
